intro: 6 hard problems that drill the Manachers Algorithm pattern — ideal for focused practice sessions.

faqs.question: Why practice hard Manachers Algorithm problems?
faqs.answer: Difficulty-scoped drills lock the pattern before you mix constraints on harder variants.
